projects.settings.title: Project Settings
projects.settings.subtitle: System-wide defaults for projects, tasks, and attachments.
projects.settings.max_size_hint: Value must be between 1 and 100 MB.
projects.settings.allowed_types_hint: Toggle the file types users are allowed to upload.
projects.business_case_placeholder: Why is this project necessary? What is the business impact?
projects.manager_authority_placeholder: What authority does the manager have over budget and decisions?
projects.success_criteria_placeholder: How will we measure project success?
projects.approval_criteria_placeholder: What conditions must be met for project approval?
projects.business_case_help: Why this project now — the problem or opportunity and expected value.
projects.manager_authority_help: The project manager's authority over decisions, resources, and spending.
projects.success_criteria_help: How we'll know the project succeeded — measurable indicators.
projects.requirements_help: The core requirements needed to deliver the project.
projects.approval_criteria_help: Conditions that must be met to approve and accept deliverables.
projects.exit_criteria_help: When the project is considered complete and formally closed.
projects.help.name: A clear, concise name that identifies the project and is used to refer to it across all reports and documents.
projects.help.department: The owning unit responsible for delivering the project; sets the line of accountability and authority.
projects.help.program: The program or initiative the project belongs to; links it to higher strategic goals.
projects.help.status: The project's current stage; affects available actions and reporting.
projects.help.priority: The project's relative importance; guides resource allocation and management attention.
projects.help.start_date: Planned work start date; the basis for building the schedule and milestones.
projects.help.end_date: Target completion date; sets the duration and bounds milestones and tasks.
projects.help.budget: Total pre-approved funding; a reference for controlling spend and tracking cost.
projects.help.description: A brief overview of the project and its context, giving the reader a quick understanding of it.
projects.help.objectives: The specific, measurable results the project aims to achieve; the benchmark for judging success.
projects.help.in_scope: The work and deliverables the project covers; draws its boundaries and prevents scope creep.
projects.help.out_of_scope: What the project explicitly does not cover; removes ambiguity and guards against unagreed expectations.
projects.help.team: The people assigned to carry out the project work and their roles; clarifies responsibilities and delivery capacity.
projects.help.stakeholders: Parties who influence or are affected by the project and their level of influence; the basis for communication and expectation management.
projects.help.milestones: Key reference points and their deliverables on the timeline; enable tracking progress against clear checkpoints.
projects.help.tasks: The execution work distributed across the team and milestones; turns the plan into trackable delivery.
projects.help.risks: Uncertain events that could affect the project and the planned responses; early preparation reduces surprises.
projects.help.human_resources: The people and skills required to deliver the project; confirming their availability is essential to a realistic plan.
projects.help.technical_resources: The tools, systems, and technical infrastructure needed; a shortfall in any blocks execution.
projects.help.financial_resources: The operating funding required and how it will be spent; complements the budget with spending detail.
projects.exit_criteria_placeholder: When is the project formally complete?
projects.target_process_placeholder: What process do you want to improve?
projects.problem_statement_placeholder: Describe the problem clearly (current state and impact)
projects.root_cause_placeholder: What are the true root causes of the problem?
projects.expected_benefits_placeholder: What benefits are expected from the improvement?
projects.current_state_placeholder: Describe the current state of the process
projects.pdca_check_measure_hint: Enter the measured KPI values before advancing to the Check phase.
